name: Pasta Casserole/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chopped beef and onion in a skillet.
2. Drain the mixture and transfer it to the crockpot.
3. Stir in salt, garlic powder, Worcestershire sauce, and flour.
4. Add water, bouillon, and wine; mix well.
5. Cover and cook on low for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Cook macaroni according to package directions.
7. Add cooked pasta, mushrooms, and sour cream to the crockpot; stir to combine.
8. Cover and cook on high for 10 to 15 minutes.
